log: REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:19+3=22 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:4+-2=2 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:18+-2=16 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.

→ Javelin: [d20:17+6=23 vs AC 20] HIT! 10 damage. Eladrin — Armored Escapist HP: 49/59
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
